heroTitle: The sleekest way to run document operations across teams, approvals, and clients
heroSubtitle: Docuside brings together document generation, approval routing, client collaboration, file governance, and premium white-label workflows in one polished control layer.
socialProofLabel: Built for founders, HR leaders, legal teams, and client-facing operations
softwareModulesTitle: Everything your teams need in one document operating system
softwareModulesSubtitle: Each capability is built to work together so super admins, internal teams, and clients all move through the same clean lifecycle.
pricingSectionSubtitle: All plans include customization support, implementation guidance, and a rollout structure tailored to your organization.
pricingPageTitle: Choose the one-time purchase model that fits your rollout
pricingPageSubtitle: From focused team deployments to organization-wide digital operations, every plan supports custom workflows, branding, and guided implementation.
contactHeading: Talk to our team about your rollout
contactSubtitle: Share your document workflows, approval complexity, client portal needs, and branding expectations. We will shape the right one-time purchase and customization scope.
contactPageSubtitle: Tell us where your document process slows down today. We will help you scope the right setup, customization path, and purchase plan.
demoPageSubtitle: Walk through the platform with your workflows, teams, and approval structure in mind so the demo feels like your future system, not a generic showcase.
demoBenefits: See document ops, approvals, file governance, and client flows together
Review the exact modules relevant to HR, legal, admin, or leadership teams
Discuss customization, migration, branding, and rollout planning live
screenshotsSectionSubtitle: Real product views help buyers understand the depth of the workspace before they book a call. Showcase the parts of Docuside that matter most to your rollout.
featureHighlights: Role-based document generation, review, approval, and audit visibility
Client-ready portal experience with controlled access and tracked activity
One-time purchase plans with full customization and white-label rollout support

featureCards.title: Calm, governed workflows
featureCards.description: Replace cluttered document handling with elegant approvals, tracked reviews, and neatly structured operations.

featureCards.title: Premium client experiences
featureCards.description: Give clients a clean portal with role-aware access, shared documents, file requests, and clear workflow visibility.

featureCards.title: Tailored for your business
featureCards.description: Customize branding, roles, permissions, templates, integrations, and lifecycle flows without rebuilding your entire stack.

softwareModules.title: Document Ops and advanced editing
softwareModules.description: Create, manage, revise, and govern documents with structured fields, direct content editing, metadata, and workflow-aware controls.

softwareModules.title: Roles, permissions, and approvals
softwareModules.description: Control who can access what, route documents through approval chains, and keep governance visible across every stage.

softwareModules.title: Client portals and collaboration
softwareModules.description: Share relevant documents with clients, collect requirements, enable signatures, and track progress inside a clean portal.

softwareModules.title: Enterprise operations and intelligence
softwareModules.description: Run renewals, analytics, integrations, API connectivity, and guided admin operations from the same control surface.

featureScreenshots.title: Dashboard overview
featureScreenshots.description: A unified command layer for monitoring activity, workflows, and operational visibility.

featureScreenshots.title: Document Ops workspace
featureScreenshots.description: Advanced editing, metadata controls, structured content handling, and enterprise document management.

featureScreenshots.title: File Manager
featureScreenshots.description: Centralized document repositories, supporting files, and managed content across the workspace.

featureScreenshots.title: Roles and permissions
featureScreenshots.description: Govern access, responsibilities, and workflow authority with admin-grade control.

pricingPlans.name: Launch
pricingPlans.description: Best for one business unit getting started with document automation.

pricingPlans.name: Growth
pricingPlans.description: For growing organizations that need multi-team automation and stronger governance.

pricingPlans.name: Enterprise Custom
pricingPlans.description: Built for large organizations needing tailored governance, data structures, and rollout support.
